svg.title: Front Panel - Engineering Drawing (Display-Module-Aware)
svg.desc: Three-view orthographic projection of the front panel with display module phantoms. Coordinate system: X=width (0-220mm), Y=depth (0-4mm base, 0-9mm at docks), Z=height (0-400mm). Origin at exterior front-bottom-left. Front view (looking along -Y): X horizontal, Z vertical. Side view (looking along -X): Y horizontal, Z vertical. Top view (looking along -Z): X horizontal, Y vertical.
svg.text: Material: ABS/ASA (3D printed) | Envelope: 220W x 4D x 400H mm | All dimensions in mm

g.text: Section through slot top edge | Scale 5:1
Section through dock center | Scale 4:1 | Y horiz, Z vert
needs puck shell or deeper recess.
1. Both dock recesses are 50mm dia for uniform aesthetics (see open items).
2. RP2040 module: 33mm dia x 9.8mm thick CNC aluminum; 25mm visible display.
3. S3 module: 48x48mm x 33mm deep (includes rotary knob); 32.4mm display.
4. Blue dashed phantoms show display modules seated in recesses.
5. Panel thickens to 9mm behind dock areas (4mm base + 5mm recess boss).
6. Cartridge slot: 148x84mm (inner), 5mm 45-deg chamfer on top and sides. Outer lip: 158x94mm. Bottom at Z=0 (open).
7. Cable exit holes: 8mm dia, Y-axis, centered in each dock recess.
8. LED window: 6x6mm at X=110, Z=90 (panel center, near slot top).
A. RP2040 dock oversized (50mm for 33mm module); consider 38-40mm or puck adapter.
B. S3 protrudes 28mm at 5mm recess; needs puck shell or deeper pocket.
C. S3 square form (48x48) in round 50mm recess needs rotational adapter.

svg.text: Soda Flavor Injector | Front Panel | Rev 2 (display-module-aware) | 2026-03-26
